metadata.notes: Phase 2 committed fixtures use hand-labeled deterministic swatches for repeatable offline evaluation smoke. Extend with real photos in test_images/color_eval before final report claims.

images.notes: Five equal visual color bands: red, blue, green, yellow, black.
Five equal muted visual color bands: rose, teal, ochre, slate, cream.
Vermeer portrait, dominant blue turban, gold sash, dark background, skin tone, white collar
Warhol-style pop art, flat color blocks, repeated Mickey motif, high contrast outlines
